comment.body:
do you have your tools that you are familiar with? RSI, ATR, volume indicators... etc
do you get where to check intraday realized and implied volatility? (your brokerage is obligated to provide them)

then lets read the post, mark the levels.
the mean reversion lvls are for probabilities.. basically projecting the bell curve on the chart.
the vol based lvls like the centroid of the positioning or the upside/downside pivots, give you infos if you read the volatility while checking the PA.
momentum based lvls, are the standard sentiment lvls key support/resistances.
comment.raw_body:

then lets read the post, mark the levels.
the mean reversion lvls are for probabilities.. basically projecting the bell curve on the chart.
the vol based lvls like the centroid of the positioning or the upside/downside pivots, give you infos if you read the volatility while checking the PA.
momentum based lvls, are the standard sentiment lvls key support/resistances.
